title: GenericityAssessment
description: Output of genericity-review. Identifies unnecessary specificity in a concept.

specific_to.description: Aspects that are unnecessarily specific to the current domain or use case.

adjustments.description: Proposed changes that would increase genericity without losing purpose.

generic_after.description: Genericity rating after proposed adjustments. 1 = domain-locked, 5 = fully generic.
